sections.markdown:
- Activity: Night Run
- Started: 2025-09-30 00:48
- Distance: 8.5 km
- Moving time: 50:37
- Elapsed time: 50:41
- Elevation gain: 118.4 m
- Average heart rate: 162.1 bpm
- Max heart rate: 177 bpm
- Average watts: 208.9 W
- Average speed: 10.1 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `165.1 bpm`, ranging from `152.8` to `176.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `158.0 bpm` and second-half average HR was `172.2 bpm` (+14.2 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `176.0 spm`, with a working range of `102.0` to `177.9 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `174.9 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `176.0 spm` (+1.1 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:56 /km` across `8.527 km` in `50:37` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:57 /km` and second-half pace was `5:56 /km` (-1 s/km), so pace stayed broadly even.

- Strava summary HR came in at `162.1 bpm` average and `177 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `157.2 bpm` in the first half and `167.0 bpm` in the second (+9.9 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `50:37` out of `50:41` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `4` stop segments and `0.4%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `128.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.6 m` and `69.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `34.6 m` in the first half and `93.6 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
